/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/record_lime_gscn_scan.dir/demo/record_lime_gscn_scan.c.o CMakeFiles/record_lime_gscn_scan.dir/src/radio/radio_factory.c.o CMakeFiles/record_lime_gscn_scan.dir/src/radio/radio_lime.c.o CMakeFiles/record_lime_gscn_scan.dir/src/common/log.c.o CMakeFiles/record_lime_gscn_scan.dir/src/common/cli.c.o -o record_lime_gscn_scan  libnr_core.a libtoa_io.a -lm -lSoapySDR
